subject: docs(session): add next-session recheck context
body:
Added detailed "Next session" section to SESSION_NOTES with:
- What changed in the pattern docs that invalidates old gap analysis
- Specific task description for re-auditing 10 app repos
- List of repos to check and access pattern for sibling repos
